retrieval.name: module format (ESM vs CommonJS)
retrieval.task: Can I use require() and module.exports in this codebase, or is it ESM-only? What import settings are enforced?

retrieval.name: multi-agent release coordination
retrieval.task: How should I coordinate commit, version bump, tag and push for a release while other agents work on the same repo in parallel without merge conflicts?

retrieval.name: bundle size / externals
retrieval.task: The built CLI bundle is huge after build. What configuration decides which dependencies are inlined versus kept external?

retrieval.name: register a new MCP tool
retrieval.task: What is the full procedure to add and register a brand new MCP tool so the server exposes it?

retrieval.name: serialize crash on undefined frontmatter
retrieval.task: Writing a memory file throws an error when a frontmatter field is undefined. Why does serialization fail and how is it handled?

retrieval.name: embeddings packaging
retrieval.task: Should the embeddings package be a peer dependency, or shipped with the CLI/MCP so a normal global install keeps semantic search working?

retrieval.name: tool environment independence
retrieval.task: Can a new hAIve command depend on the user's Sonar MCP server being configured, or must every tool work standalone with no external setup?

retrieval.name: deterministic embeddings in tests
retrieval.task: How can unit tests run semantic search deterministically without downloading the real transformers model?

retrieval.name: core layer purity
retrieval.task: Is it allowed to add filesystem reads or network calls inside the core domain package, or must it stay pure?

retrieval.name: code-map scope (tracked vs untracked)
retrieval.task: Does the code-map index untracked or gitignored files, or only the project's tracked source files?
